title: The Coward at the Crossroads
target: decide whether to hire the deserter loitering outside the chapel

contributions.line: Veska's keen eyes catch the slight twitch in his hand, betraying his rehearsed lies.
Imogen's warm smile and gentle tone coax out his real reason for fleeing, revealing desperation.

outcomeNarrative: Veska's sharp perception and Imogen's charm uncover the deserter's true fear, convincing the team to take a chance on him despite the risks.
